columns.name: Date
columns.description: The date when the request was received by CloudFront.

columns.name: Time
columns.description: The time when the request was received by CloudFront.

columns.name: XEdgeLocation
columns.description: The edge location that served the request.

columns.name: ScBytes
columns.description: The number of bytes returned by CloudFront to the viewer.

columns.name: CIp
columns.description: The IP address of the viewer that made the request.

columns.name: CsMethod
columns.description: The HTTP method of the viewer request.

columns.name: CsHost
columns.description: The domain name of the CloudFront distribution.

columns.name: CsUriStem
columns.description: The URI stem of the request (domain to query string).

columns.name: ScStatus
columns.description: The HTTP status code returned to the viewer.

columns.name: CsReferer
columns.description: The value of the HTTP referer header.

columns.name: CsUserAgent
columns.description: The user-agent header of the request.

columns.name: CsUriQuery
columns.description: The query string portion of the URI, if any.

columns.name: CsCookie
columns.description: The cookie header of the request.

columns.name: XEdgeResultType
columns.description: The result type of the request at the edge location.

columns.name: XEdgeRequestId
columns.description: A unique ID assigned to the request by CloudFront.

columns.name: XHostHeader
columns.description: The host header value received in the request.

columns.name: CsProtocol
columns.description: The protocol used by the viewer (HTTP or HTTPS).

columns.name: CsBytes
columns.description: The number of bytes received from the viewer by CloudFront.

columns.name: TimeTaken
columns.description: Total time in seconds CloudFront took to process the request.

columns.name: XForwardedFor
columns.description: The X-Forwarded-For header value, if present.

columns.name: SslProtocol
columns.description: The SSL/TLS protocol version used for the request.

columns.name: SslCipher
columns.description: The SSL/TLS cipher used for the request.

columns.name: XEdgeResponseResultType
columns.description: The result type of the response from CloudFront.

columns.name: CsProtocolVersion
columns.description: The HTTP version used in the request (e.g., HTTP/2.0).

columns.name: FleEncryptedFields
columns.description: Encrypted fields, if Field-Level Encryption is enabled.

columns.name: CPort
columns.description: The port number of the client making the request.

columns.name: TimeToFirstByte
columns.description: Time (in seconds) to start sending the response.

columns.name: XEdgeDetailedResultType
columns.description: More detailed result type for the request.

columns.name: ScContentType
columns.description: The content type of the response.

columns.name: ScContentLen
columns.description: The length of the response content.

columns.name: ScRangeStart
columns.description: Start of the byte range requested, if any.

columns.name: ScRangeEnd
columns.description: End of the byte range requested, if any.

columns.name: DistributionId
columns.description: The distribution ID serving the request.

columns.name: Asn
columns.description: Autonomous System Number of the client.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the log entry was generated.

columns.name: AuthorAccountId
columns.description: The account ID of the author.

columns.name: AuthorDisplayName
columns.description: The display name of the author.

columns.name: AuthorIsExternalCollaborator
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is an external collaborator.

columns.name: AuthorUserKey
columns.description: The user key of the author.

columns.name: AuthorAccountType
columns.description: The account type of the author.

columns.name: AuthorPublicName
columns.description: The public name of the author.

columns.name: AuthorExternalCollaborator
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is an external collaborator.

columns.name: RemoteAddress
columns.description: The remote address of the author.

columns.name: CreationDate
columns.description: The creation date of the audit log entry.

columns.name: Summary
columns.description: The summary of the audit log entry.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: The description of the audit log entry.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: The category of the audit log entry.

columns.name: SysAdmin
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is a system administrator.

columns.name: SuperAdmin
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is a super administrator.

columns.name: AffectedObjectName
columns.description: The name of the affected object.

columns.name: AffectedObjectObjectType
columns.description: The type of the affected object.

columns.name: ChangedValues
columns.description: The changed values of the audit log entry.

columns.name: AssociatedObjects
columns.description: The associated objects of the audit log entry.

columns.name: EventCreationTime
columns.description: The creation time of the event.

columns.name: EventCategoryType
columns.description: The category type of the event.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time in which the event was generated.

columns.name: IngestionTime
columns.description: The date and time that the line was written to the store. This is used when there are multiple lines for each file, such as when a change is detected, or if 24 hours have passed since the last store line was added.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Time the asset information was collected (snapshot or the changefeed of that asset was taken)

columns.name: AssetID
columns.description: Unique identifier of the Asset. E.g. device ID, Document ID etc.

columns.name: CreatedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time the Asset was created.

columns.name: AssetOwner
columns.description: Owner of the asset: e.g. File owner (from filesystem metadata). AccountUpn

columns.name: AssetType
columns.description: Type of the asset: File, Site, Mailbox etc.

columns.name: AdditionalFields
columns.description: Additional unmapped information about the event in JSON array format

columns.name: Provider
columns.description: The vendor who is providing this information: Microsoft/3P Providers etc.

columns.name: AssetSource
columns.description: The source which generates the information: Microsoft, Snowflake, Salesforce etc.

columns.name: Workload
columns.description: The workload within the source which is generating this information: Azure, M365 etc.

columns.name: SubWorkload
columns.description: Sub workload within the Workload which is generating this information: Exchange, SharePoint, Teams in M365

columns.name: Location
columns.description: Location of the resolved IP (city/region/country), source from which it came from.

columns.name: Classification
columns.description: Sensitive Data classification: PII, HIPAA, Financial Data, etc. MIP classification and confidence level

columns.name: ClassificationLastScanDateTime
columns.description: Last time an asset was scanned to derive the classification. This is necessary to understand the darkdata on the Purview side.

columns.name: IsProtectedByDlp
columns.description: Whether the asset is protected by any DLP policy

columns.name: Risks
columns.description: All the documented issues or risks attached to the asset.

columns.name: IdentityDirectorySource
columns.description: e.g Azure Active Directory, Okta etc.

columns.name: LastAccessDateTime
columns.description: Last date and time the asset was accessed.

columns.name: LastModifiedDateTime
columns.description: Last date and time the asset was modified.

columns.name: IsAssetRemoved
columns.description: Signifies if the asset is deleted or not?

columns.name: SensitivityLabel
columns.description: Whether the file is digitally signed, and if so, whether the signature is valid.

columns.name: ThreatCategory
columns.description: Type of threat: phishing, malware hosting, etc).

columns.name: ThreatName
columns.description: Name of detected threat family (e.g. malware name).

columns.name: RequestSourceIP
columns.description: (If network-delivered) Source IP associated with the file event.

columns.name: AssetPath
columns.description: Fully qualified path of the asset: Filepath or site path.

columns.name: InternalUserWithPermissionCount
columns.description: Total number of permissions assigned to internal users within an organization. De-duped count of users (preferred)

columns.name: ExternalUserWithPermissionCount
columns.description: Total number of permissions assigned to external users outside an organization. De-duped count of users (preferred)

columns.name: DeviceName
columns.description: Fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the device or the host name of the file.

columns.name: UserName
columns.description: Account associated with the file action.

columns.name: AssetSize
columns.description: Size of the file in bytes.

columns.name: SHA256
columns.description: SHA-256 of the file, if this field is usually not populated — use the SHA1 column when available.

columns.name: SignatureStatus
columns.description: The "signature status" of a file indicates whether its digital signature is valid, invalid, or has a recoverable error, confirming the file's integrity and the sender's identity after being signed with a digital certificate

columns.name: IPAddress
columns.description: IP address resolved for the domain (IPv4/IPv6).

columns.name: URL
columns.description: Full URL requested (path, query string included).

columns.name: ISP
columns.description: Internet Service Provider hosting the site.

columns.name: ASN
columns.description: Autonomous System Number of the hosting provider.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time when the record was generated

columns.name: ReceivedTime
columns.description: The time when the event was received

columns.name: EndpointName
columns.description: Name of the endpoint involved in the event

columns.name: TrapsVersion
columns.description: Version of the Traps agent installed on the endpoint

columns.name: AgentType
columns.description: Type of agent involved in the event

columns.name: Result
columns.description: Outcome or result of the event

columns.name: Reason
columns.description: Reason for the event or action

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time in which the event was generated.

columns.name: ExternalId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the alert in the external system (Cortex XDR).

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Level of severity of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High, Critical).

columns.name: MatchingStatus
columns.description: Status of matching detection logic (e.g., matched or not matched).

columns.name: EndMatchAttempt
columns.description: Timestamp of the last match attempt in Unix epoch format.

columns.name: LocalInsert
columns.description: Local timestamp of when the alert was inserted into the system in Unix epoch format.

columns.name: BiocIndicator
columns.description: Indicator or behavior related to the alert, stored as a dynamic object (behavioral IOC data).

columns.name: MatchingServiceRuleId
columns.description: ID of the matching rule or service used to trigger the alert.

columns.name: AttemptCounter
columns.description: Number of attempts to match this alert with detection rules.

columns.name: Whitelisted
columns.description: Indicates whether the alert has been whitelisted (true/false).

columns.name: Starred
columns.description: Indicates whether the alert has been marked as important or starred (true/false).

columns.name: MitreTechniqueIdAndName
columns.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique ID and name associated with the alert.

columns.name: MitreTacticIdAndName
columns.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactic ID and name associated with the alert.

columns.name: AgentVersion
columns.description: Version of the Cortex XDR agent that generated the alert.

columns.name: AgentFQDN
columns.description: Fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the endpoint device where the alert originated.

columns.name: AgentOSType
columns.description: Operating system type of the agent (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux).

columns.name: AgentDataCollectionStatus
columns.description: Status indicating whether the agent is actively collecting data (true/false).

columns.name: MacAddress
columns.description: MAC address of the endpoint device, represented as a dynamic object.

columns.name: AlertId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the alert in Cortex XDR.

columns.name: DetectionTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the detection occurred, in Unix epoch format.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Name of the detection or alert.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: Category or classification of the alert (e.g., malware, suspicious activity).

columns.name: EndpointId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the endpoint where the alert was detected.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Detailed description of the alert or detection.

columns.name: HostIp
columns.description: IP address of the host machine where the alert was generated, represented as a dynamic object.

columns.name: HostName
columns.description: Name of the host machine where the alert was generated.

columns.name: Source
columns.description: Source of the alert or detection data (e.g., Cortex XDR, endpoint agent).

columns.name: Action
columns.description: Action taken in response to the alert (e.g., block, quarantine, notify).

columns.name: ActionPretty
columns.description: Human-readable version of the action taken for the alert.

columns.name: CausalityActorCausalityId
columns.description: Causality ID of the actor involved.

columns.name: CausalityActorProcessCommandLine
columns.description: Command line used by the causality actor's process.

columns.name: CausalityActorProcessImageMd5
columns.description: MD5 hash of the causality actor's process image.

columns.name: CausalityActorProcessImageName
columns.description: Name of the causality actor's process image.

columns.name: CausalityActorProcessImagePath
columns.description: Path to the causality actor's process image.

columns.name: CausalityActorProcessImageSha256
columns.description: SHA256 hash of the causality actor's process image.

columns.name: CausalityActorProcessSignatureStatus
columns.description: Signature status of the causality actor's process.

columns.name: IdentityType
columns.description: Type of identity associated with the entry.

columns.name: OperationName
columns.description: Name of the operation being logged.

columns.name: CloudProvider
columns.description: Cloud provider associated with the log entry.

columns.name: ResourceType
columns.description: Type of resource involved in the log entry.

columns.name: ActionCountry
columns.description: Country in which the action was taken.

columns.name: DnsQueryName
columns.description: DNS query name associated with the log entry.

columns.name: FwEmailRecipient
columns.description: Email recipient in the firewall log.

columns.name: FwEmailSender
columns.description: Email sender in the firewall log.

columns.name: FwEmailSubject
columns.description: Subject line of the email in the firewall log.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: Type of the event being logged.

columns.description: SHA256 hash of the file macro involved in the action.

columns.description: MD5 hash of the file involved in the action.

columns.name: ActionFileName
columns.description: Name of the file involved in the action.

columns.name: ActionFilePath
columns.description: Path to the file involved in the action.

columns.name: ActionFileSha256
columns.description: SHA256 hash of the file involved in the action.

columns.description: MD5 hash of the actor's process image.

columns.description: Path to the actor's process image.

columns.description: OS process ID of the actor's process.

columns.description: SHA256 hash of the actor's process image.

columns.name: ActorProcessSignatureStatus
columns.description: Signature status of the actor's process.

columns.name: ActorProcessSignatureVendor
columns.description: Vendor of the signature for the actor's process.

columns.name: ActorThreadThreadId
columns.description: Thread ID of the actor's thread.

columns.name: ActionLocalIp
columns.description: Local IP address associated with the action.

columns.name: ActionLocalPort
columns.description: Local port associated with the action.

columns.name: OsActorProcessCommandLine
columns.description: Command line used by the OS actor's process.

columns.description: Name of the image used by the OS actor's process.

columns.description: SHA256 hash of the OS actor's process image.

columns.description: Vendor of the signature for the OS actor's process.

columns.name: OsActorEffectiveUsername
columns.description: Effective username of the OS actor.

columns.name: ActionProcessSignatureStatus
columns.description: Signature status of the action process.

columns.name: ActionProcessSignatureVendor
columns.description: Vendor of the signature for the action process.

columns.description: Dynamic object containing registry data for the action.

columns.name: ActionRegistryFullKey
columns.description: Full registry key associated with the action.

columns.name: ActionExternalHostname
columns.description: External hostname associated with the action.

columns.description: Name of the action process's image.

columns.description: SHA256 hash of the action process's image.

columns.description: Domain of the URL in the firewall log.

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: User agent string associated with the log entry.

columns.description: Instance ID of the actor's process.

columns.description: Indicates if the firewall log entry is related to phishing.

columns.description: Username associated with the log entry.

columns.description: Current status of the Cortex XDR agent (e.g., active, inactive, disconnected).

columns.description: IP address of the host machine, stored as a dynamic object.

columns.description: Timestamp of when the agent was last seen active, in Unix epoch format.

columns.description: List of users associated with the endpoint, stored as a dynamic object.

columns.description: The number of low severity alerts regarding the incident.

columns.description: Any comments associated with the event.

columns.name: TimeGenerated

columns.description: When the item was first crawled

columns.name: CacheDecision
columns.description: Indicates whether a request was served from the cache or the backend.

columns.name: EnforcedSecurityPolicy
columns.description: Indicates whether a security policy (such as a WAF or access control rules) was applied to a request.

columns.name: PreviewSecurityPolicy
columns.description: Request matches a rule configured for preview (present only when a preview rule would have taken priority over the enforced rule).

columns.name: EnforcedEdgeSecurityPolicy
columns.description: the edge security policy rule that was enforced.

columns.name: PreviewEdgeSecurityPolicy
columns.description: populated if a request matches an edge security policy rule configured for preview.

columns.name: PayloadRemoteIp
columns.description: The remote ip address of the payload.

columns.name: SecurityPolicyRequestData
columns.description: The security policy data of the request.

columns.name: StatusDetails
columns.description: The status details of the request.

columns.name: RemoteIp
columns.description: The remote ip of the request.

columns.name: RequestMethod
columns.description: The http method of the request.

columns.name: RequestStatus
columns.description: The status code of the request.

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: The user agent of the request.

columns.name: BackendServiceName
columns.description: The backend service name in Google Cloud Platform .

columns.description: The forwarding rule resource of the load balancer in Google Cloud Platform.

columns.name: ProjectId
columns.description: The Project id in Google Cloud Platform

columns.name: UrlMapName
columns.description: The url map resource name in Google Cloud Platform.

columns.name: Zone
columns.description: The Zone name of the Load Balancer.

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: Information including a suffix identifying the log sub-type (e.g., admin activity, system access, data access) and where in the hierarchy the request was made.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The time the event described by the log entry occurred.

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: Optional. Providing a unique identifier for the log entry allows Logging to remove duplicate entries with the same timestamp and insertId in a single query result.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: The unique identifier for the record.

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) when the record was created.

columns.name: IsCertValid
columns.description: Indicates whether the certificate is valid.

columns.name: FileDisplayName
columns.description: The display name of the file.

columns.name: AgentIp
columns.description: The IP address of the agent.

columns.name: AccountName
columns.description: The name of the account associated with the event.

columns.name: AgentMachineType
columns.description: The machine type of the agent.

columns.name: InitiatedByDescription
columns.description: Description of the initiated by field.

columns.name: AutomaticallyResolved
columns.description: Indicates whether the issue was automatically resolved.

columns.name: AgentId
columns.description: The unique identifier for the agent.

columns.name: ProcessArguments
columns.description: The unique identifier for the malicious group.

columns.name: MitigationReport
columns.description: Report of the actions taken by the Agent.

columns.name: UpdatedAt
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) when the record was last updated.

columns.name: InitiatedBy
columns.description: Indicates by whom or what the action was initiated.

columns.name: AgentNetworkStatus
columns.description: The network status of the agent.

columns.name: AgentComputerName
columns.description: The computer name of the agent.

columns.name: AgentIsActive
columns.description: Indicates whether the agent is active.

columns.name: SiteId
columns.description: The unique identifier for the site.

columns.name: FileContentHash
columns.description: The hash of the file content.

columns.name: Username
columns.description: The username associated with the event.

columns.name: FileSha256
columns.description: The SHA-256 hash of the file.

columns.name: AgentIsDecommissioned
columns.description: Indicates whether the agent is decommissioned.

columns.name: CollectionId
columns.description: The unique identifier for the collection.

columns.name: AccountId
columns.description: The unique identifier for the account.

columns.name: AgentDetectionInfo
columns.description: The information of the agent in detection.

columns.name: AgentRealtimeInfo
columns.description: The information of the agent in realtime.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time in which the event was generated.

columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time in which the event was generated.

columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the event was generated.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: Type of the event provided by Trellix.

columns.name: DetectedUtc
columns.description: UTC timestamp at which the event was detected.

columns.name: ReceivedUtc
columns.description: UTC timestamp at which the event was received.

columns.name: SourceHostName
columns.description: Host name of the event source.

columns.name: SourceIPv4
columns.description: IPv4 address of the event source.

columns.name: SourceIPv6
columns.description: IPv6 address of the event source.

columns.name: SourceMac
columns.description: MAC address of the event source.

columns.name: SourceUserName
columns.description: User name of the event source.

columns.name: SourceProcessName
columns.description: Process name of the event source.

columns.name: TargetHostName
columns.description: Host name of the event target.

columns.name: TargetIPv4
columns.description: IPv4 address of the event target.

columns.name: TargetIPv6
columns.description: IPv6 address of the event target.

columns.name: TargetMac
columns.description: MAC address of the event target.

columns.name: TargetUserName
columns.description: User name of the event target.

columns.name: TargetProcessName
columns.description: Process name of the event target.

columns.name: TargetFileName
columns.description: File name of the event target.

columns.name: ThreatHandled
columns.description: Indicates if the threat was handled.

columns.name: Subject
columns.description: Subject of the performed action. Currently domains and application users

columns.name: User
columns.description: email address or organization that performed the action

columns.name: PerformedAt
columns.description: Date and time (UTC) when the action was performed

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Date and time (UTC) when the event was registered

columns.name: EventCategory
columns.description: Event category: User, Domain or Service management, DMARC, SPF, DKIM and policy changes

columns.name: EventSeverity
columns.description: Impact of the change: high, medium,low or informational

columns.name: IsHighValueEvent
columns.description: True if the event can impact email deliverability

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time in which the event was generated.
